source_jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
SENIOR INFRA BACKEND ENGINEER


Company Overview
Singular is the leading marketing measurement platform trusted by 1,000+ global brands, including Apple, Microsoft, Uber, DoorDash, Nike, EA, DraftKings, and Robinhood. Ranked as the #1 MMP by G2 for 3 years in a row, Singular enables marketers to make smarter user acquisition decisions and analyze the impact of every ad dollar with full-funnel marketing analytics, advanced cross-device attribution (mobile, web, PC+Console), best-in-class ad fraud prevention, and automatic data exports directly into your BI tools. Singular is also revolutionizing campaign and creative analysis with recent integrations and partnerships with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini that deliver marketers with instant, AI-powered marketing insights – no dashboards or SQL needed.

Singular has teams in 12 countries and employees in 65 cities across the globe, including NYC, LA, SF, Austin, Buenos Aires, São Paolo, London, Berlin, Barcelona, Tel Aviv, Bangalore, Beijing, and Seoul. We have raised $50M from Norwest Venture Partners, General Catalyst, Titanium Ventures, and other top-tier Silicon Valley investors.

We have a leading product, an innovative team, and hundreds of satisfied customers in a growing market. Our business and teams are scaling, and we are looking for ambitious, eager, creative, and innovative individuals to join us and help us dominate the marketing measurement space.


About The Role
We seek a skilled Senior Infra Backend Engineer to join our R&D office in Tel Aviv, working in a hybrid and flexible model.
You’ll collaborate with a top-tier R&D team and take your professional growth to the next level. Our backend infra teams work mainly with Python and Go, but we welcome talented backend engineers from any language background.



Example Projects

 - Researching and running POCs of new technologies to select the optimal solution for system requirements.
   

 - Migrating massive amounts of user-level data into Iceberg, while keeping scale and cost efficiency in mind.
   

 - Designing and implementing a robust pipeline capable of ingesting billions of real-time events daily (hundreds of thousands per second).
   

 - Exploring and choosing database and streaming technologies to support a rapidly growing clientele base.
   

 - Leading the design and development of a new streaming ETL product with low memory footprint and efficient processing.
   


Key Responsibilities

 - Design and build scalable pipelines processing billions of events daily.
   

 - Dive deep into infra technologies and optimize them at scale.
   

 - Lead major efforts from idea initiation → design → implementation.
   

 - Tackle complex challenges in scalable architecture within our AWS environment.
   

 - Integrate and leverage top industry technologies such as Kafka, Iceberg, DynamoDB, Postgres, EMR, Kubernetes, Druid, Snowflake, and more.



What You Bring

 - 5+ years of hands-on experience in backend development.
   

 - Extensive experience building scalable, high-performance systems.
   

 - Experience with AWS, Kubernetes, and large-scale environments is a plus.


Why Join Us?
At Singular, you’ll be part of a talented group of engineers solving complex, large-scale infra challenges.
We believe in a healthy, positive culture where knowledge is shared and people enjoy the journey together.
We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer, committed to hiring diverse top talent to build world-class products.

source_jobs.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW

 

AI is redefining how marketers measure and optimize growth, and Singular is built to turn that complexity into clear, actionable insight. Trusted by leading global brands including Microsoft, Uber, Nike, DoorDash, Rovio, EA, DraftKings, and Robinhood, Singular unifies marketing data across every channel, giving teams a single source of truth to measure true ROI and optimize performance at scale.


Singular combines attribution, cost aggregation, and full-funnel analytics to track the entire user journey across mobile, web, and beyond. At its core is a powerful AI layer that analyzes performance, detects anomalies, and helps teams decide what to do next, transforming analytics into real-time decision-making.

With built-in ad fraud prevention, seamless data pipelines into BI tools, and deep ecosystem integrations, Singular empowers teams to eliminate wasted spend, scale what works, and focus on growth.

Singular is a global company with teams across 12 countries and 65 cities, including NYC, LA, SF, Austin, Buenos Aires, São Paulo, London, Berlin, Barcelona, Tel Aviv, Bangalore, Beijing, and Seoul. Backed by top-tier investors including Norwest Venture Partners, General Catalyst, and Titanium Ventures, we are scaling quickly with a clear mission: to redefine how companies measure, understand, and act on their marketing performance.

 
 
 

About The Role

We are looking for a top-notch Senior Full Stack Engineer who will work on our next first-to-market AI-powered products and create elegant solutions using the latest technologies. This position will be based in our R&D office in the heart of Tel-Aviv.


In this role, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining end-to-end (client and server) features and web applications. You will work closely with our design, product, and AI teams to translate complex requirements into intelligent, user-friendly experiences powered by data and automation.


As part of Singular’s growing AI initiatives, you will help build products that leverage LLMs, AI agents, and advanced analytics to deliver actionable insights for marketers at scale. You will have the opportunity to work on innovative AI-driven experiences, integrate modern AI infrastructure and tools, and shape how customers interact with and understand their data.

We deeply encourage our engineers to develop a deep understanding of our industry, our customers, and emerging AI technologies, while continuously growing their engineering skills. You will also have the chance to work in one of the most professional R&D teams in the startup community and grow professionally.



Our Stack: React.js, Python, Django, MySQL, AWS, Redis, Druid, Trino, OpenAI/LLM technologies, and more!


 

Example Projects

 - Creative AI Analysis https://www.singular.net/creative-iq/ - Generate AI-powered insights from ad creatives to help marketers understand performance drivers and optimize campaigns.

 - Singular MCP https://www.singular.net/blog/singular-chatgpt-mcp/ - Enable customers to export and interact with Singular marketing data through MCP integrations and workflows.

 - Singular AI Agent - Build an AI-powered assistant capable of answering deep, context-aware questions about customer marketing data and performance.
   
   
   

Key Responsibilities

 

 - Build and maintain backend services responsible for integrating with a wide variety of APIs, webhooks, and partners.

 - Design, develop, and own integration flows end-to-end: architecture, implementation, deployment, and monitoring.

 - Work on data pipelines handling large volumes of streaming and batch data with high reliability and low latency.

 - Ensure data accuracy and consistency across ingestion, transformation, and storage layers.

 - Collaborate with product, data engineering, and customer-facing teams to understand edge cases, resolve production issues, and improve partner integrations.

 - Take ownership of features and systems while proact

source_jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SINGULAR

About Us

Singular is the leading marketing measurement platform trusted by 1,000+ global brands, including Apple, Microsoft, Uber, DoorDash, Nike, EA, DraftKings, and Robinhood. Ranked as the #1 MMP by G2 for 3 years in a row, Singular enables marketers to make smarter user acquisition decisions and analyze the impact of every ad dollar with full-funnel marketing analytics, advanced cross-device attribution (mobile, web, PC+Console), best-in-class ad fraud prevention, and automatic data exports directly into your BI tools. Singular is also revolutionizing campaign and creative analysis with recent integrations and partnerships with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini that deliver marketers with instant, AI-powered marketing insights – no dashboards or SQL needed.

Singular has teams in 12 countries and employees in 65 cities across the globe, including NYC, LA, SF, Austin, Buenos Aires, São Paolo, London, Berlin, Barcelona, Tel Aviv, Bangalore, Beijing, and Seoul. We have raised $50M from Norwest Venture Partners, General Catalyst, Titanium Ventures, and other top-tier Silicon Valley investors.

We have a leading product, an innovative team, and hundreds of satisfied customers in a growing market. Our business and teams are scaling, and we are looking for ambitious, eager, creative, and innovative individuals to join us and help us dominate the marketing measurement space.

The  Customer Success team here at Singular is the central touchpoint for our biggest and most advanced customers, orchestrating the post-sales customer lifecycle in partnership with Solutions Engineers, Account Executives and Support. You’ll be responsible for managing the customer relationship, coordinating internally with product, marketing, and other teams. You’ll drive product adoption and guide the customer to take full advantage of the Singular platform. Fundamentally, you as a  CSM will ensure our largest most complex customers derive value from our platform, and ultimately renew and grow their relationship with us. We are looking for a Customer Success Manager who is passionate about customers and the ways in which they use data to drive results. As a Customer Success Manager supporting Strategic Accounts, you will have the opportunity to help some of the world’s most influential companies solve their toughest data problems. So if you get excited about things like defining a roadmap for success, you may be the Customer Success Manager we’re looking for!




WHAT YOU’LL DO

You’ll be the quarterback for a select portfolio of enterprise customers responsible for driving impactful outcomes and growth. You’ll act as the primary business point of contact for all of your clients and serve as a trusted consultant on their behalf. Someone who can truly drive transformation and create customers for life. A few of the key activities you’ll be responsible for are as follows:

 - Gain a deep understanding of the business needs of your clients and create tangible, long-term goals. A curious and challenging mindset will prove extremely valuable!

 - Develop and deliver a roadmap to success. Drive product adoption and ongoing usage of Singular, while promoting customer satisfaction and advocacy.

 - Manage the customer relationship, acting as trusted advisor to executive and senior leadership in Marketing, Engineering, Product, Business Analytics, and Finance

 - Partner with the Sales team to advance account renewals and expansion.

 - Lead the process for aligning the marketing executives you partner with on their goals, and plan & execute on a roadmap to help them reach their desired outcomes.

 - Making sure that some of our biggest and most sophisticated customers are being successful in achieving their marketing goals.

 - Proactively identify accounts risks and develop save plans (coordinating activities internally within Singular and external with customers) to resolve.

 - Analyze your portfolio, identify risks and opportunities and prioritize f

source_jobs.title: Product Support Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

Singular is the leading marketing measurement platform trusted by 1,000+ global brands, including Apple, Microsoft, Uber, DoorDash, Nike, EA, DraftKings, and Robinhood. Ranked as the #1 MMP by G2 for 3 years in a row, Singular enables marketers to make smarter user acquisition decisions and analyze the impact of every ad dollar with full-funnel marketing analytics, advanced cross-device attribution (mobile, web, PC+Console), best-in-class ad fraud prevention, and automatic data exports directly into your BI tools. Singular is also revolutionizing campaign and creative analysis with recent integrations and partnerships with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini that deliver marketers with instant, AI-powered marketing insights – no dashboards or SQL needed.

Singular has teams in 12 countries and employees in 65 cities across the globe, including NYC, LA, SF, Austin, Buenos Aires, São Paolo, London, Berlin, Barcelona, Tel Aviv, Bangalore, Beijing, and Seoul. We have raised $100M from Norwest Venture Partners, General Catalyst, Titanium Ventures, and other top-tier Silicon Valley investors.

We have a leading product, an innovative team, and hundreds of satisfied customers in a growing market. Our business and teams are scaling, and we are looking for ambitious, eager, creative, and innovative individuals to join us and help us dominate the marketing measurement space.

Singular is looking for a Product Support Engineer with strong technical and communication skills to join our India support team. This role is ideal for someone passionate about problem-solving, customer experience, and technology. You’ll be working closely with our customers and internal teams to troubleshoot issues, guide product usage, and contribute to a seamless customer journey.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Provide timely and high-quality technical support to Singular’s customers and partners

 - Troubleshoot complex product issues across mobile SDKs, APIs, and dashboards

 - Work with internal teams (Product, Engineering, Customer Success) to resolve cases and escalate when needed

 - Become a subject-matter expert in Singular’s product suite and the AdTech/mobile marketing ecosystem

 - Help create internal documentation, FAQs, and knowledge base articles

 - Act as a customer advocate by delivering feedback to product and engineering


WHAT YOU’LL NEED

 - 2–5 years of experience in product or technical support, preferably in a SaaS, AdTech, or mobile environment

 - Familiarity with REST APIs, HTTP protocols, and debugging tools like browser dev tools/Postman

 - Ability to write basic SQL queries and use scripting/regex for analysis

 - Exposure to mobile SDKs (Android/iOS) and mobile app ecosystems is a plus

 - Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills

 - Clear and concise communication skills, both written and verbal

 - A collaborative mindset with the ability to work with distributed global teams


WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING AT SINGULAR

We’re building a diverse, collaborative, and fast-paced environment where everyone has a voice. You’ll be part of a global team that values innovation, customer obsession, and personal growth.

source_jobs.title: Solutions Consultant

Singular is also revolutionizing campaign and creative analysis with recent integrations and partnerships with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini that deliver marketers with instant, AI-powered marketing insights – no dashboards or SQL needed.

Singular has teams in 12 countries and employees in 65 cities across the globe, including NYC, LA, SF, Austin, Buenos Aires, São Paolo, London, Berlin, Barcelona, Tel Aviv, Bangalore, Beijing, and Seoul. We have raised $50M from Norwest Venture Partners, General Catalyst, Titanium Ventures, and other top-tier Silicon Valley investors.

We have a leading product, an innovative team, and hundreds of satisfied customers in a growing market. Our business and teams are scaling, and we are looking for ambitious, eager, creative, and innovative individuals to join us and help us dominate the marketing measurement space.

Singular is searching for a Solutions Consultant who is a highly motivated and energetic self-starter with a proven track record of supporting pre-sales teams in consultative value-selling. The ideal candidate thrives in this fast paced environment, is detail oriented, and places emphasis on maximizing sales opportunities. He or she must have great communication skills, the ability to explain technical concepts, a passion for problem solving and be excellent at operating in a cross-functional capacity.



What you’ll do:

 - Manage a pipeline of sales opportunities with Americas account executives to ensure Singular’s value across all cross-functional teams is realized.

 - Identify pain points of existing advertiser ad/martech workflows & processes to emphasize the necessity of Singular product

 - Demonstrate the Singular platform to highlight customer use cases

 - Align with prospects’ BI/Analytics, Product, Developer teams to address all technical questions, RFPs/RFIs, and competitive objections

 - Actively deploy and manage proof of concepts/trials from scoping through to execution against defined success criteria with the support of Solutions Engineering team

 - Communicate internal roadmap and new product features to evangelize with customers and their feedback to Singular product management and engineering groups

 - Build customer trust through professional and swift onboarding

 - Hold demos, webinars, and customer training to drive revenue

 - Work with Marketing to develop training materials and train local teams

 - Prioritize products or feature requests from customers and deliver to Product.



What you’ll need:

 - 5+ years of experience in a client-facing, value-based selling capacity

 - Deep knowledge of performance marketing measurement & analytics, data management processes, and marketing databases/infrastructure

 - Experience and knowledge integrating mobile SDKs, Javascript tags and Rest APIs

 - Experience with SaaS based business models and proven track record of attaining sales revenue targets

 - Experience in Ad Tech with attribution and/or analytics SaaS platforms

 - Knowledge of Attribution, DMPs, and CDPs

 - Familiarity with ETL structure and database frameworks - a big plus

 - Passion for solving problems

source_jobs.title: Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
Product Manager - Strategic Initiatives


About Us

Singular is the leading marketing measurement platform trusted by 1,000+ global brands, including Apple, Microsoft, Uber, DoorDash, Nike, EA, DraftKings, and Robinhood. Ranked as the #1 MMP by G2 for 3 years in a row, Singular enables marketers to make smarter user acquisition decisions and analyze the impact of every ad dollar with full-funnel marketing analytics, advanced cross-device attribution (mobile, web, PC+Console), best-in-class ad fraud prevention, and automatic data exports directly into your BI tools. Singular is also revolutionizing campaign and creative analysis with recent integrations and partnerships with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini that deliver marketers with instant, AI-powered marketing insights – no dashboards or SQL needed.


Singular has teams in 12 countries and employees in 65 cities across the globe, including NYC, LA, SF, Austin, Buenos Aires, São Paolo, London, Berlin, Barcelona, Tel Aviv, Bangalore, Beijing, and Seoul. We have raised $50M from Norwest Venture Partners, General Catalyst, Titanium Ventures, and other top-tier Silicon Valley investors.

We have a leading product, an innovative team, and hundreds of satisfied customers in a growing market. Our business and teams are scaling, and we are looking for ambitious, eager, creative, and innovative individuals to join us and help us dominate the marketing measurement space.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We are seeking a seasoned Senior Product Manager to lead strategic initiatives that will shape the future of Singular's platform. This role requires a blend of strategic thinking, technical depth, and exceptional leadership skills to drive cross-company initiatives and coordinate with all aspects of our business.

You'll spearhead major product themes that increase Singular’s addressable market and enhance the product value to customers. This role demands someone who can think big, execute flawlessly, and inspire teams across the organization.



What you will do:

 - Define and execute product strategy for major platform enhancements and new capabilities

 - Coordinate cross-functional teams across the entire organization, including engineering, sales, customer success, and marketing

 - Work closely with core engineering teams to bring ambitious products to market

 - Own products from strategic vision through customer discovery, execution, launch, and performance analysis

 - Serve as a product evangelist both internally and externally, representing Singular's product vision to customers and partners

 - Mentor other product team members and contribute to the overall product culture and methodology
   
   

What you bring:

 - 4+ years of product management experience with a track record of leading strategic initiatives

 - Deep industry knowledge in martech platforms, advertising networks, or marketing analytics

 - Experience with major advertising and analytics platforms (Google Ads, Facebook Ads, AppLovin, Google Analytics, Adobe Marketing)

 - Previous experience at high-performing product management teams with proven ability to scale product organizations

 - Strong technical background with ability to engage deeply with engineering teams and understand complex technical concepts

 - Exceptional leadership and communication skills with experience coordinating large, cross-functional teams

 - Data-driven decision making with strong analytical capabilities

 - Experience in SaaS, preferably in the marketing technology space

 - Excellent written and verbal communication in English



As a proud equal opportunity employer, we're committed to hiring top talent regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. source_jobs.title: Account Executive - Extract
source_jobs.description:
About EXTRACT http://extract.to/

Extract http://Extract.to is a cutting-edge data movement company that helps businesses seamlessly extract and activate data to fuel business intelligence and decision-making. We’re passionate about enabling our clients to unlock the full potential of their data, and we’re building a foundational sales team of ambitious, innovative professionals ready to make a major impact.

Extract was born out of Singular, a next generation attribution and analytics provider with a global footprint, over $50M in capital investment and a strong customer base, including leading companies like LinkedIn, Warner Bros, Electronic Arts, and Uber.

Job Overview

We’re looking for a results-driven Sales Executive to help build our sales function from the ground up. This role is highly strategic and focused on product-led growth: converting active users into paying customers, expanding utilization, and evangelizing the Extract brand. If you thrive in an entrepreneurial, technology-driven environment and enjoy building client relationships while driving revenue growth, this is the role for you.

What you will do:

 - Carry and exceed an annual revenue quota

 - Forecast and monitor sales metrics using MEDDICC methodology

 - Prospect to product users, Singular customers, and target accounts to generate consistent pipeline

 - Manage opportunities end-to-end: discovery, demos, stakeholder alignment, and ensuring customer success

 - Establish and manage partner channel networks to drive referrals

 - Execute campaigns to increase customer utilization and revenue

 - Attend industry events as a product and brand evangelist

 - Collaborate closely with product and marketing teams to maximize growth

What you will need:

 - 4+ years of sales or account mgmt experience, with a track record of exceeding quota

 - Strong understanding of ETL/ELT and Reverse ETL, and associated buyer personas

 - Experience selling SaaS via product-led growth

 - Ability to manage multiple clients and projects in a fast-paced environment

 - Experience in business development and referral channel partnerships

 - Excellent written and verbal communication skills

 - Technical acumen and hands-on experience with sales tools (Salesforce, Hubspot, etc.)

What We Offer:

 - Competitive base salary + performance-based commission

 - Flexible working environment

 - Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling, innovative company

 - Collaborative and supportive team culture

As a proud equal opportunity employer, we're committed to hiring top talent regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. We don't just accept differences - we celebrate you being who you are for the benefit of our employees, our products, and our community.

source_jobs.title: Junior Marketing Manager
source_jobs.description:
Junior Marketing Manager - APAC

Singular is the leading marketing measurement platform trusted by 1,000+ global brands, including Apple, Microsoft, Uber, DoorDash, Nike, EA, DraftKings, and Robinhood. Ranked as the #1 MMP by G2 for 3 years in a row, Singular enables marketers to make smarter user acquisition decisions and analyze the impact of every ad dollar with full-funnel marketing analytics, advanced cross-device attribution (mobile, web, PC+Console), best-in-class ad fraud prevention, and automatic data exports directly into your BI tools. Singular is also revolutionizing campaign and creative analysis with recent integrations and partnerships with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini that deliver marketers with instant, AI-powered marketing insights – no dashboards or SQL needed.

Singular has teams in 12 countries and employees in 65 cities across the globe, including NYC, LA, SF, Austin, Buenos Aires, São Paolo, London, Berlin, Barcelona, Tel Aviv, Bangalore, Beijing, and Seoul. We have raised $50M from Norwest Venture Partners, General Catalyst, Titanium Ventures, and other top-tier Silicon Valley investors.

We have a leading product, an innovative team, and hundreds of satisfied customers in a growing market. Our business and teams are scaling, and we are looking for ambitious, eager, creative, and innovative individuals to join us and help us dominate the marketing measurement space.

Join our rapidly scaling company, a leader in the marketing measurement space with an innovative product, a strong team, and a growing base of satisfied customers. We are looking for an ambitious, creative, and innovative individual to help us dominate the market.



The Opportunity



Singular is seeking a talented and dynamic Marketing Manager to spearhead our marketing efforts in the APAC region, focusing specifically on developing and executing localized strategies to support our growing customer base in China and Korea.



Key Responsibilities:

 - Regional Strategy & Execution: Develop and implement comprehensive regional marketing plans aligned with global corporate objectives to drive lead generation, support sales, and boost revenue growth across APAC.

 - Sales Enablement: Work closely with regional sales teams and the global marketing team to create effective marketing programs, collateral, and campaigns that directly support regional sales goals.

 - Event Leadership: Plan, manage, and execute regional events, conferences, and trade shows to maximize brand visibility and lead generation opportunities.

 - Local Content Development: Collaborate with the global content marketing team to produce region-specific marketing materials, case studies, and sales tools that resonate deeply with the APAC audience.

 - Market Insights: Conduct thorough market research to understand local customer preferences, identify key industry trends, and analyze the competitive landscape to inform and optimize marketing strategies.

 - Performance Measurement: Define Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) and regularly report on the effectiveness of all marketing programs and campaigns to regional and corporate leadership.

What You Bring:

 - Experience: Proven track record as a Marketing Manager in the APAC region, successfully developing and implementing regional marketing strategies that achieve market growth.

 - Education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field. An MBA is a plus.

 - APAC Expertise: Strong understanding of the challenges and needs of digital marketing teams based in APAC.

 - Technical Proficiency: Expertise in digital marketing tools, CRM systems, and analytics platforms.

 - Execution Skills: Excellent project management abilities, with the capacity to effectively manage multiple simultaneous initiatives and ensure clear, cross-functional communication.

 - Communication: Exceptional interpersonal and communication skills.

As a proud equal opportunity employer, we're committed to hiring top talent regardless of

source_jobs.title: GTM Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Extract http://Extract.to is a cutting-edge data movement company that helps businesses seamlessly extract and activate data to fuel business intelligence and decision-making. We’re passionate about enabling our clients to unlock the full potential of their data, and we’re building a foundational sales team of ambitious, innovative professionals ready to make a major impact.

Extract was born out of Singular, a next-generation attribution and analytics provider with a global footprint, over $50M in capital investment, and a strong customer base, including leading companies such as LinkedIn, Warner Bros., Electronic Arts, and Uber. We built a new growth engine in the data space -Extract. It focuses on helping companies move and activate data across their stack for analytics, BI, and downstream use cases. Our go-to-market approach is evolving. We are moving toward more precision, more signal-driven targeting, and stronger systems that support execution at scale.

We are looking for a GTM Engineer to build the infrastructure behind this motion.



THE ROLE

This is a hands-on, technical GTM role responsible for building and operating our outbound engine. You will design and connect the systems that turn ICPs and account lists into a scalable, high-quality pipeline. This role sits at the intersection of data, systems, and outbound execution. The focus is not on campaigns. The focus is on building the engine that powers them.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Build the outbound engine using Clay
   
   - Design and manage tables for ICP accounts, personas, and enrichment
   
   - Connect multiple data sources into usable datasets
   
   - Turn static account lists into dynamic, signal-driven targeting systems

 - Drive community and content distribution
   
   - Build and engage with relevant communities where target users spend time
   
   - Identify and activate channels such as LinkedIn, niche data communities, and operator groups
   
   - Support distribution of content to drive awareness and inbound interest

 - Support content and video production
   
   - Work with Marketing to translate product and use cases into simple, clear content
   
   - Contribute to lightweight content creation such as demos, explainers, and short videos
   
   - Help turn outbound learnings into content that scales messaging and engagement

 - Own data enrichment and signals
   
   - Integrate enrichment providers and external data sources
   
   - Layer in intent, behavioral, and trigger-based signals
   
   - Build scoring logic based on fit, timing, and engagement

 - Design outbound workflows and automation
   
   - Build workflows across CRM, sequencing tools, and automation platforms
   
   - Enable programmatic outbound with personalization at scale
   
   - Reduce manual SDR work while improving quality and consistency

 - Enable personalization at scale
   
   - Use structured data and AI tools to support relevant outbound messaging
   
   - Add account-level context to sequences
   
   - Support SDRs with research and execution

 - Own pipeline infrastructure
   
   - Define how accounts move from target to engaged to meeting to pipeline
   
   - Ensure clean routing, tracking, and prioritization
   
   - Support speed to lead and coordination between inbound and outbound
   
   - Run experiments and improve performance. Test data sources, signals, and workflows. Continuously iterate based on what drives meetings and the pipeline

 - Partner across GTM
   
   - Work closely with Demand Gen, SDRs, Sales, and Product Marketing
   
   - Align targeting, messaging inputs, and execution.
   
   - Act as the technical backbone of outbound and pipeline generation




WHO YOU ARE

 - You have experience as a GTM Engineer, Growth Engineer, RevOps Engineer, or a highly technical growth or operations role in B2B SaaS

 - You have hands-on experience with Clay or similar tools

 - You understand outbound and how the pipeline is actually generated

 - You think

source_jobs.title: Partnership Lead
source_jobs.description:
About Us

Singular is the leading marketing measurement platform trusted by 1,000+ global brands, including Apple, Microsoft, Uber, DoorDash, Nike, EA, DraftKings, and Robinhood. Ranked as the #1 MMP by G2 for 3 years in a row, Singular enables marketers to make smarter user acquisition decisions and analyze the impact of every ad dollar with full-funnel marketing analytics, advanced cross-device attribution (mobile, web, PC+Console), best-in-class ad fraud prevention, and automatic data exports directly into your BI tools. Singular is also revolutionizing campaign and creative analysis with recent integrations and partnerships with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini that deliver marketers with instant, AI-powered marketing insights – no dashboards or SQL needed.

Singular has teams in 12 countries and employees in 65 cities across the globe, including NYC, LA, SF, Austin, Buenos Aires, São Paolo, London, Berlin, Barcelona, Tel Aviv, Bangalore, Beijing, and Seoul. We have raised $50M from Norwest Venture Partners, General Catalyst, Titanium Ventures, and other top-tier Silicon Valley investors.

We have a leading product, an innovative team, and hundreds of satisfied customers in a growing market. Our business and teams are scaling, and we are looking for ambitious, eager, creative, and innovative individuals to join us and help us dominate the marketing measurement space.

 

About the Role

 

We are searching for a Head of Partnerships APAC to lead and manage regional partnership development with top networks, agencies, and technology partners in APAC.

 

The ideal candidate will be a highly motivated individual with experience in the mobile advertising industry and will have demonstrated success of consistently meeting or exceeding business pipeline and revenue targets and building strong relationships with key advertisers and partners.

 

What you will do:

 

 - Regional Partner GTM Strategy: Develop and execute a regional partnerships plan in alignment with company objectives to generate partner-sourced leads/pipeline, support mutual customer success, and explore areas of joint business growth.

 

 - Partner Education: Lead education of Singular’s platform with regional partners to ensure that they are aware of key competitive differentiators. Identify areas where there are joint value propositions to accelerate mutual business growth through partnership alignment.

 

 - Channel Sales & Reseller Programs: Lead and manage pipeline with existing reseller/referral partners. Identify and sign new regional referral/reseller partners to align with company objectives. Work closely with our partners to deliver against mutual business goals.

 

 - Agency Development: Drive relationships with regional agency partners. Provide training to Singular’s platform and provide ongoing education and product training support agencies to help drive RFPs for new business, in addition to escalations that revolve around customer onboarding.

 

 - Partner Marketing Strategy: Work closely with regional sales and marketing teams to deliver against the regional marketing strategy by identifying partnerships that can help accelerate our GTM and distribution efforts. Co-marketing programs will include events, webinars, reports/guides, and case studies.

 

 - Partner Product Support + Advocacy: Work closely with partners to understand evolving needs that they have with MMP and attribution partners. Provide ongoing feedback on partner/industry needs to Product, Integrations and R&D teams.

 

What you will need

 

 - Bachelor’s degree

 - 5+ years in sales, partnerships, customer success, or other GTM-facing roles

 - Strong knowledge of mobile app + measurement ecosystem

 - Strong communication and presentation skills

source_jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

Singular is the leading marketing measurement platform trusted by 1,000+ global brands, including Apple, Microsoft, Uber, DoorDash, Nike, EA, DraftKings, and Robinhood. Ranked as the #1 MMP by G2 for 3 years in a row, Singular enables marketers to make smarter user acquisition decisions and analyze the impact of every ad dollar with full-funnel marketing analytics, advanced cross-device attribution (mobile, web, PC+Console), best-in-class ad fraud prevention, and automatic data exports directly into your BI tools. Singular is also revolutionizing campaign and creative analysis with recent integrations and partnerships with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini that deliver marketers with instant, AI-powered marketing insights – no dashboards or SQL needed.

Singular has teams in 12 countries and employees in 65 cities across the globe, including NYC, LA, SF, Austin, Buenos Aires, São Paolo, London, Berlin, Barcelona, Tel Aviv, Bangalore, Beijing, and Seoul. We have raised $50M from Norwest Venture Partners, General Catalyst, Titanium Ventures, and other top-tier Silicon Valley investors.

We have a leading product, an innovative team, and hundreds of satisfied customers in a growing market. Our business and teams are scaling, and we are looking for ambitious, eager, creative, and innovative individuals to join us and help us dominate the marketing measurement space.




THE ROLE:

Singular is searching for a Customer Success Manager who is highly motivated and energetic self-starter to work directly with customers and trial users to ensure that they are getting the most value possible out of our product. He or she will proactively identify new areas of product features and enhancements that will go to further increase client engagement on Singular’s product. He or she will have a strong understanding of the mobile advertising ecosystem, attribution and what a mobile marketer has to go through on a day-to-day basis.

 


KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Serve as client advocate in all respects of the Singular product, project managing all customer onboarding and overseeing all technical solution deliveries to get clients properly implemented on our solution.

 - Regularly meet and engage customers to understand how they are using the platform and provide ideas, training on product features and enhancements that will further increase customer engagement and retention.

 - Consistently meet or exceed customer retention goals and applicable success metrics.

 - Work closely with internal resources on escalation and resolution processes for critical customer issues.

 - Become a trusted advisor to customers to fully understand their needs and help find ways to solve or simplify these pain points through Singular’s product.

 - Identify incremental revenue opportunities and hold regular QBRs (in-person and remotely).

 


WHAT’S IMPORTANT

 - 3+ years professional experience supporting a SaaS-based business model in client services, customer success or account management.

 - Prior experience leading technical implementations and supporting technical relationships with large companies–mobile user acquisition or product-related role in mobile is a HUGE plus.

 - Strong understanding of mobile marketing ecosystem and the companies in this space including but not limited to, MMPs, ad networks, ad trackers, exchanges, PMDs, BI/analytics companies.

 - Consistent record as a top performer in a customer success role understanding client’s needs

 - Passionate about working in a high-touch customer-facing role and interest for complex technology.

 - Self-starter, excellent communication and presentation skills, highly refined interpersonal skills.

 - Enjoys working in a fast-paced, growth environment.

 - Positive, “can-do” attitude!

 


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Travel onsite to customer locations where appropriate

 - Provide regular updates to Client Success Director, product team and management on customer satisfaction

source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
About Singular

Singular is the leading marketing measurement platform trusted by 1,000+ global brands, including Apple, Microsoft, Uber, DoorDash, Nike, EA, DraftKings, and Robinhood. Ranked as the #1 MMP by G2 for 3 years in a row, Singular enables marketers to make smarter user acquisition decisions and analyze the impact of every ad dollar with full-funnel marketing analytics, advanced cross-device attribution (mobile, web, PC+Console), best-in-class ad fraud prevention, and automatic data exports directly into your BI tools. Singular is also revolutionizing campaign and creative analysis with recent integrations and partnerships with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini that deliver marketers with instant, AI-powered marketing insights – no dashboards or SQL needed.

Singular has teams in 12 countries and employees in 65 cities across the globe, including NYC, LA, SF, Austin, Buenos Aires, São Paolo, London, Berlin, Barcelona, Tel Aviv, Bangalore, Beijing, and Seoul. We have raised $50M from Norwest Venture Partners, General Catalyst, Titanium Ventures, and other top-tier Silicon Valley investors.

We have a leading product, an innovative team, and hundreds of satisfied customers in a growing market. Our business and teams are scaling, and we are looking for ambitious, eager, creative, and innovative individuals to join us and help us dominate the marketing measurement space.


The role: 

This is a superb opportunity to join a growing sales team and play an integral role in building the foundation of our future sales organization. We are looking for a hunter with experience in mobile SaaS to sell a technical product to various business functions - marketing/UA, analytics, product, BI, etc. This role is highly strategic, focused on the largest and most innovative clients across key verticals including Gaming, Commerce, Travel and Lifestyle. You will be the dominant driver of revenue growth, and be on the front lines evangelizing our platform to key stakeholders.

 What you’ll do:

 - Manage entire sales cycle from client prospecting, conducting meetings, product demos to deal negotiation and customer hand-off to Customer Success. Account Executives will work directly with dedicated Sales Development resources on lead generation efforts.

 - Proactively develop lead-generation plan and establish best practices on lead conversion with Sales Development team.

 - Consultative selling leveraging previous experience building long term client relationships.

 - Consistently meet or exceed monthly and quarterly revenue targets.

 - Work closely with Customer Success and Product team to communicate client feedback internally.

 - Attend key industry events and trade shows and actively represent Singular’s brand presence.

 - Forge trusting relationships with both internal and external partners.

What you’ll need:

 - 5+ years in a Sales role, working with or selling into marketing teams of mobile app developers and overall digital marketing teams.

 - Strong rolodex within key performance marketing verticals, including but not limited to, Gaming, Commerce, Travel, Lifestyle and Agencies.

 - Intimate understanding of mobile marketing ecosystem and the companies in this space including but not limited to ad tracking, analytics, marketing automation, ad networks, DSPs, FMPs, agencies, monetization platforms, SDKs, etc.

 - Experience working for companies in the martech/adtech ecosystem, especially in mobile.

 - Experience selling SaaS based products/technologies.

 - Proven track record of consistently meeting/exceeding revenue targets, with a demonstrated success at maintaining strong & long-term client relationships.

 - Proven ability to work in a dynamic, fast-paced startup environment.

 - Strong team player mindset.

 - Excellent problem-solving skills and impeccable business judgment.

 - Excellent interpersonal and communication skills.

 - BA/BS degree.

 As a proud equal opportunity employer, we're committed to hiring top talent

source_jobs.title: Senior Solutions Engineer
source_jobs.description:
SENIOR SOLUTIONS ENGINEER



ABOUT SINGULAR

Singular is the leading marketing measurement platform trusted by 1,000+ global brands, including Apple, Microsoft, Uber, DoorDash, Nike, EA, DraftKings, and Robinhood. Ranked as the #1 MMP by G2 for 3 years in a row, Singular enables marketers to make smarter user acquisition decisions and analyze the impact of every ad dollar with full-funnel marketing analytics, advanced cross-device attribution across mobile, web, PC, and console, best-in-class ad fraud prevention, and automatic data exports directly into BI tools.



Singular is also advancing campaign and creative analysis through integrations and partnerships with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini, helping marketers access AI-powered marketing insights without relying only on dashboards or SQL.



Singular has teams in 12 countries and employees across 65 cities, including NYC, LA, SF, Austin, Buenos Aires, São Paulo, London, Berlin, Barcelona, Tel Aviv, Bangalore, Beijing, and Seoul. We have raised $100M from Norwest Venture Partners, General Catalyst, Titanium Ventures, and other top-tier Silicon Valley investors.



We have a leading product, an innovative team, and hundreds of customers in a growing market. Our business and teams are scaling, and we are looking for ambitious, creative, technical, and customer-focused people to help us continue building the future of marketing measurement.




THE ROLE

Singular is looking for a Senior Solutions Engineer to support complex customer implementations, technical onboarding, advanced troubleshooting, and ongoing technical advisory needs across the Americas.



This role sits at the intersection of customer success, technical implementation, product feedback, and scalable solution design. You will partner closely with Engineering, Product, Sales, Customer Success, and Support to help customers implement Singular successfully, resolve complex technical challenges, and identify repeatable patterns that improve how our team operates.



The ideal candidate has strong technical depth, strong customer-facing judgment, and the ability to operate independently in ambiguous situations. You should be comfortable investigating SDK, API, attribution, data validation, web, and reporting issues directly, while also communicating clearly with customer engineering, marketing, analytics, and business stakeholders.



This is not a purely reactive support role. You will be expected to help turn recurring customer and implementation challenges into better documentation, workflows, internal tools, enablement, and product feedback. You should also be comfortable using AI tools to improve implementation workflows, accelerate troubleshooting, summarize technical context, and create scalable internal resources.



This is a fully remote position reporting to the Director of Solution Engineering, Americas.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own and support technical implementation of Singular’s platform, from scoping and planning through onboarding, validation, and post-launch technical advisory.

 - Provide senior technical ownership and continuity for high-priority customer accounts across the Americas, supporting complex implementations, escalations, and ongoing technical advisory needs.

 - Lead or support complex SDK, API, attribution, web-to-app, S2S, event tracking, data validation, and reporting investigations.

 - Use SQL, logs, APIs, internal tools, and customer-provided technical context to investigate data quality, attribution, and implementation issues.

 - Build trust with customer engineering, marketing, analytics, and business stakeholders through clear communication, structured problem solving, and reliable follow-through.

 - Partner with Customer Success and Sales to support customer happiness, retention, expansion, and technical confidence.

 - Collaborate with Engineering and Product to identify customer-backed product gaps, recurring implementation patterns, and roadmap opportunities.

 - Work with

source_jobs.title: Product Manager (LATAM)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

Singular is a leading marketing measurement platform trusted by 1,000+ global brands, including Apple, Microsoft, Uber, DoorDash, Nike, EA, DraftKings, and Robinhood. Ranked as the #1 MMP by G2 for 3 years in a row, Singular helps marketers make smarter user acquisition decisions and measure the impact of every marketing dollar with full-funnel analytics, cross-device attribution, and advanced fraud prevention.

We are also innovating in AI-powered marketing insights through integrations with tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini, enabling customers to get answers instantly without dashboards or SQL.

Singular has teams in 12 countries and employees in 65 cities across the globe, including NYC, LA, SF, Austin, Buenos Aires, São Paulo, London, Berlin, Barcelona, Tel Aviv, Bangalore, Beijing, and Seoul. We are a fast-growing, product-led company backed by top-tier Silicon Valley investors.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a Product Manager to join our Product team and help build and improve core capabilities of Singular’s platform.

This role is focused on driving product execution, improving existing features, and working closely with engineering teams to deliver high-quality product experiences for our global customers.

You’ll work on meaningful product areas within a large-scale data and analytics platform, and help shape how customers interact with marketing performance data at scale.

This is a hands-on product role suited for someone who enjoys execution, working closely with engineering, and building products in a fast-moving environment.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Define and drive product improvements and feature development for key areas of the platform

 - Work closely with engineering teams to deliver high-quality product releases

 - Collaborate with design, data, and customer-facing teams to understand user needs

 - Translate customer feedback into clear product requirements

 - Support product discovery and execution cycles from idea to delivery

 - Help improve product adoption and customer experience across the platform
   
   


WHAT YOU BRING

 - 4+ years of product management experience

 - Experience working in SaaS or B2B software companies

 - Familiarity with data-heavy or analytics products (advantage)

 - Ability to work closely with engineering teams and understand technical concepts

 - Strong execution mindset and attention to detail

 - Good communication skills in English

 - Experience in fast-paced product environments
   
   


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Fully remote-first position (LATAM-based)

 - Flexible working culture built on trust and ownership

 - Opportunity to work on a large-scale global product used by top-tier companies

 - Strong engineering and product culture

High-impact work with real ownership and growth opportunities



Why Join Us?
At Singular, you’ll be part of a talented group of engineers solving complex, large-scale infra challenges.
We believe in a healthy, positive culture where knowledge is shared and people enjoy the journey together.
We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer, committed to hiring diverse top talent to build world-class products.

Singular is also revolutionizing campaign and creative analysis with recent integrations and partnerships with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini that deliver marketers with instant, AI-powered marketing insights – no dashboards or SQL needed.

We have raised $50M from Norwest Venture Partners, General Catalyst, Titanium Ventures, and other top-tier Silicon Valley investors.

We have a leading product, an innovative team, and hundreds of satisfied customers in a growing market. Our business and teams are scaling, and we are looking for ambitious, eager, creative, and innovative individuals to join us and help us dominate the marketing measurement space.

 

About the Role

We are searching for a Head of Partnerships LATAM to lead and manage regional partnership development with top networks, agencies, and technology partners in LATAM

 

The ideal candidate will be a highly motivated individual with experience in the mobile advertising industry and will have demonstrated success of consistently meeting or exceeding business pipeline and revenue targets and building strong relationships with key advertisers and partners.

 

What you will do:

 

 - Regional Partner GTM Strategy: Develop and execute a regional partnerships plan in alignment with company objectives to generate partner-sourced leads/pipeline, support mutual customer success, and explore areas of joint business growth.

 

 - Partner Education: Lead education of Singular’s platform with regional partners to ensure that they are aware of key competitive differentiators. Identify areas where there are joint value propositions to accelerate mutual business growth through partnership alignment.

 

 - Channel Sales & Reseller Programs: Lead and manage pipeline with existing reseller/referral partners. Identify and sign new regional referral/reseller partners to align with company objectives. Work closely with our partners to deliver against mutual business goals.

 

 - Agency Development: Drive relationships with regional agency partners. Provide training to Singular’s platform and provide ongoing education and product training support agencies to help drive RFPs for new business, in addition to escalations that revolve around customer onboarding.

 

 - Partner Marketing Strategy: Work closely with regional sales and marketing teams to deliver against the regional marketing strategy by identifying partnerships that can help accelerate our GTM and distribution efforts. Co-marketing programs will include events, webinars, reports/guides, and case studies.

 

 - Partner Product Support + Advocacy: Work closely with partners to understand evolving needs that they have with MMP and attribution partners. Provide ongoing feedback on partner/industry needs to Product, Integrations and R&D teams.

 

What you will need

 

 - Bachelor’s degree

 - 5+ years in sales, partnerships, customer success, or other GTM-facing roles

 - Strong knowledge of mobile app + measurement ecosystem

 - Strong communication and presentation skills

 - Proven track record of exceeding sales or partner-sourced revenue goals

 - Established relationships with strategic partner channels, including DSPs, SANs, Agencies, and key thought leaders in the mobile app industry

source_jobs.title: Product Marketing Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SINGULAR

Singular is the marketing growth platform built for the AI era. We unify marketing data, spend, performance, creative, and attribution into a single source of truth so growth teams can measure what actually drives growth and act on it with confidence.

We are expanding our Product Marketing team with a Product Marketing Manager to support bringing our products to market: building the positioning, sales enablement, content, and competitive materials that help our go-to-market teams win in the fast-moving and complex measurement space.

Location: This is a remote position. We are primarily hiring candidates based in LATAM, with a preference for Argentina, Colombia, and Brazil. We are also open to candidates based in Germany.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

As a Product Marketing Manager at Singular, you will sit in the Product Marketing team and report directly to the Director of Product Marketing.

 - Own, plan, and execute go-to-market motions for part of the Singular product portfolio; coordinating across product, sales, customer success, solution consulting, support, and marketing.

 - Own, develop, and launch positioning and messaging for assigned products.

 - Own sales enablement materials for your part of the Singular portfolio: hotsheets, pitch decks, one-pagers, demo narratives, objection handling, competitive analysis, and FAQs.

 - Own competitive analysis and battlecards for assigned products, keeping them current as competitors launch, reprice, and reposition, and keeping every claim accurate and defensible.

 - Produce case studies, customer stories, newsletters, and sales narratives that tie Singular's capabilities to business outcomes.
   
   


WHAT YOU'LL GROW INTO

 - Owning a go-to-market strategy for multiple product lines end-to-end.

 - Shaping competitive strategy, not just competitive content.

 - Leading panels, webinars virtually and at events.

 - Coaching sellers on positioning and messaging, and contributing to pricing and packaging decisions.
   
   


WHAT YOU BRING

Minimum requirements

 - ~2 years in product marketing, or adjacent experience (sales enablement, competitive intelligence, content, demand generation), moving into a PMM role.

 - Native or C1 fluency in written and spoken English.

 - Strong writing and research skills, with the ability to turn technical capability into clear, value-centric messaging for both internal stakeholders and customers and prospects.

 - Experience with tools like: Figma, ClickUp, Claude/ChatGPT, Google Slides/Docs, Intercom, Hubspot, and Gong.

 - Highly collaborative, organized, and detail-oriented. You will work with a lot of diverse teams [and timezones].

 - A curious personality and a fast learner who reads widely.
   
   

Bonus capabilities [these make your C.V. even more attractive]

 - Additional native/C1 written and spoken language fluency [Spanish, Portuguese, Chinese, or Korean]

 - Exposure to mobile measurement, attribution, analytics, or the broader martech and adtech ecosystem is a strong plus.

 - Familiarity with concepts like attribution, SKAN, creative analytics, deep linking, AI for marketing analytics, or mobile fraud prevention.
   
   


WHY SINGULAR

 - Be part of a fast-moving, high-impact team shaping the future of mobile marketing.

 - Own major initiatives and influence GTM strategies at a leading SaaS company.

 - Work with top-tier marketers and data-driven growth teams.

 - Remote-friendly with opportunities for career growth.

 - Build cool internal tools that enable your sales and marketing teammates to drive value for our customers.

 - Own real deliverables that sellers use in live deals, with visible impact on win rates.

 - Learn alongside a product marketing team that works closely with product, sales, and customers.
   
   
   
   As a proud equal opportunity employer, we're committed to hiring top talent regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, status

notes: Singular is a marketing measurement platform with a strong engineering core, posting a mix of tech and non-tech roles.
